message:
fix(widgets): relax command palette scorer scaling threshold for parallel CI

Increase the 1000/100 corpus scaling ratio assertion from 15x to 25x to
absorb system noise when tests run in parallel or under CI load, while
still catching O(n^2) regressions (theoretical ratio is ~15x for O(n log n)).

Also sync beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -408,7 +408,7 @@ {"id":"bd-2dui","title":"Coverage Audit & Gap Map (No Mocks)","description":"Purpose: Establish real coverage state (no mocks) across the workspace. Produce a gap map by crate/module/function, highlighting critical logic (render diff/presenter, terminal writer, fairness guard, text width/wrap, widget search/scoring). Work: Run cargo llvm-cov overall and per crate; capture uncovered lines and paths. Identify any tests that rely on mocks/fakes and propose real-fixture replacements. Flag high-risk areas where logic is complex or user-facing. Deliverables: Coverage report + prioritized gap list (by file and risk) + recommended test targets per crate beyond CI minimums.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Coverage data collected for workspace + per-crate. 2) Gap list created with file-level targets and risk ranking. 3) Any mock/fake usage called out with proposed real-fixture alternatives. 4) Results recorded in bead notes or a short doc artifact.","notes":"Coverage audit (bd-2dui) — 2026-02-04 Commands attempted: 1) cargo llvm-cov --workspace --all-targets --json --summary-only --output-path target/llvm-cov/summary.json - Hung in ftui-demo-showcase tests; terminated test binary after ~6m. - Observed failures before termination: macro_recorder::tests::error_state_uses_distinct_style_from_recording; markdown_rich_text::tests::{markdown_renders_code_block, markdown_renders_headings, markdown_renders_task_lists}. 2) cargo llvm-cov --workspace --all-targets --exclude ftui-demo-showcase --json --summary-only --output-path target/llvm-cov/summary.json - Failed on perf-budget tests (no report). 3) cargo llvm-cov --workspace --all-targets --exclude ftui-demo-showcase --json --summary-only --output-path target/llvm-cov/summary.json --ignore-run-fail - Succeeded; report saved to target/llvm-cov/summary.json. Overall coverage (excluding ftui-demo-showcase; tests failed but report produced): - Lines: 56.45% (87,695 / 155,361) - Functions: 66.16% (10,642 / 16,085) - Regions: 58.83% (150,579 / 255,957) Per-crate line coverage (from summary.json): - ftui: 0.00% (0/8) - ftui-demo-showcase: 0.00% (0/43,080) — excluded due to hang - ftui-extras: 3.84% (487/12,668) - ftui-harness: 67.89% (3,901/5,746) - ftui-pty: 81.79% (2,457/3,004) - ftui-runtime: 84.34% (16,293/19,318) - ftui-widgets: 87.53% (27,819/31,781) - ftui-render: 90.98% (12,950/14,234) - ftui-text: 91.56% (7,173/7,834) - ftui-core: 91.94% (9,569/10,408) - ftui-i18n: 93.39% (593/635) - ftui-layout: 96.72% (4,160/4,301) - ftui-style: 97.82% (2,293/2,344) Worst-covered files (>=50 lines, 0% lines covered): - crates/ftui-extras/src/filesize.rs (0/67) - crates/ftui-extras/src/visual_fx/effects/sampling.rs (0/70) - crates/ftui-widgets/src/voi_debug_overlay.rs (0/120) - crates/ftui-pty/src/bin/pty_canonicalize.rs (0/124) - crates/ftui-extras/src/timer.rs (0/129) - crates/ftui-extras/src/live.rs (0/130) - crates/ftui-extras/src/logging.rs (0/155) - crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/cli.rs (0/171) - crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/voi_overlay.rs (0/178) - crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/mod.rs (0/200) - crates/ftui-extras/src/visual_fx/effects/plasma.rs (0/214) - crates/ftui-extras/src/image.rs (0/220) - crates/ftui-text/src/bidi.rs (0/228) - crates/ftui-extras/src/diagram.rs (0/245) - crates/ftui-extras/src/filepicker.rs (0/246) - crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/data.rs (0/264) - crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/tour.rs (0/267) - crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/performance.rs (0/274) - crates/ftui-extras/src/visual_fx/effects/metaballs.rs (0/280) - crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/notifications.rs (0/281) Failing tests / budgets encountered during coverage run (need follow-up): - ftui-render: diff::tests::perf_block_scan_vs_scalar_baseline (crates/ftui-render/src/diff.rs:1522) — 758ms for 1000 iters @200x50 > budget. - ftui-harness: regression_word_movement_large (crates/ftui-harness/tests/editor_perf.rs:104) — 100 word moves on 10k lines exceeded budget. - ftui-widgets: focus::spatial::tests::perf_spatial_navigate_100_nodes (crates/ftui-widgets/src/focus/spatial.rs:439) — 400 navigations exceeded budget. - ftui-widgets: command_palette::scorer perf tests for corpus 100/1000/5000 exceed budgets (crates/ftui-widgets/src/command_palette/scorer.rs:2584, 2605, 2626). - ftui-widgets: list_panic_on_empty_items_with_selection (crates/ftui-widgets/tests/list_panic.rs:21) — expected None, got Some(0). - Additional failing targets (details not captured in truncated output): - ftui-runtime --lib - ftui-runtime --test resize_migration_compat - ftui-text --lib - ftui-harness --test isomorphism_proofs - ftui-harness --test resize_storm_e2e Mock/fake usage found (needs replacement with real fixtures per policy): - crates/ftui-runtime/src/subscription.rs: mock subscription for testing. - crates/ftui-widgets/src/drag.rs: mock drag/drop targets in tests. - crates/ftui-core/src/caps_probe.rs: MockTerminal for capability tests. Risk-ranked gaps: HIGH: ftui-demo-showcase coverage (0%); ftui-extras coverage (3.84%) including visual_fx, logging, filepicker; perf-budget test failures in render/widgets/harness. MEDIUM: ftui-text bidi.rs (0%); ftui-widgets voi_debug_overlay (0%); ftui-pty bin coverage (0%). LOW: ftui crate (re-export) 0%. Next actions suggested: - Stabilize failing perf budget tests and list_panic regression (blocks reliable coverage runs). - Add real-fixture tests for ftui-extras and demo-showcase (E2E focus), including visual_fx effects. - Replace mock-based tests with PTY/harness fixtures (caps_probe, subscription, drag/drop).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T18:13:29.104150708Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:07:05.398834294Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T19:07:05.398809257Z","close_reason":"Coverage audit complete; notes include gap map, coverage table, failing tests, mock usage","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} {"id":"bd-2e1qh","title":"ftui-text: bidi.rs coverage","description":"Scope: crates/ftui-text/src/bidi.rs. Add tests for bidi detection, directionality, and stability on mixed scripts.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Deterministic unit tests cover bidi shaping/ordering rules and edge cases (mixed LTR/RTL, neutral chars).\n2) Assertions/logs include input text, expected order, actual order/hashes.\n3) No mocks/fakes; use real text fixtures.","notes":"Audit: bidi.rs already has extensive tests. Ran cargo llvm-cov -p ftui-text --features bidi; coverage ~99.7% with only unreachable paragraph_level else + if-let brace lines. No code changes required.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T19:15:38.015760363Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T20:26:25.562275589Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T20:21:36.890049734Z","close_reason":"Added bidi coverage tests; ftui-text --features bidi passes; coverage ~99.7%","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} {"id":"bd-2fb0s","title":"Replace mock subscription with real fixture","description":"Scope: crates/ftui-runtime/src/subscription.rs mock subscription. Replace with real event stream fixture or PTY harness.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Replace mock subscription with real runtime fixture exercising actual event flow.\n2) Deterministic unit tests include rich assertion context and trace logs for event ordering.\n3) No remaining mock usage in this module.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T19:15:45.205381089Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:59:10.452964228Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T19:59:10.452947085Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} -{"id":"bd-2fp5r","title":"Layout Core Framework (Constraints + Compaction)","description":"Background\n- We need a deterministic layout engine reusable across diagram types.\n- Layout beauty is prioritized over strict spec fidelity.\n\nScope\n- Layout primitives: NodeBox, Port, ClusterBox, RouteGrid.\n- Implement constraint system (VPSC or longest-path compaction).\n- Sugiyama layering support hooks for flowcharts (layers, crossing minimization passes).\n- Cluster packing and nested subgraph layout with padding + margins.\n- Coarse-to-fine layout: initial coarse placement → compaction/refinement.\n- Objective scoring for tie-breaks: crossings, bends, variance, symmetry, alignment.\n\nConsiderations\n- Deterministic results under ties; no RNG.\n- Scale to large graphs with bounded heuristics and early exits.\n- Layout outputs world units, not terminal cells.\n\nTests / Validation\n- Unit tests for constraints and compaction.\n- Invariant checks: no overlaps, stable ordering under equal cost.\n\nSuccess Criteria\n- Produces non-overlapping layouts for supported diagrams.\n- Deterministic output for fixed input.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T18:38:57.851893409Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T05:47:57.398414459Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2fp5r","depends_on_id":"bd-1ri6i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T18:41:56.128093077Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2fp5r","depends_on_id":"bd-2oovu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T19:00:01.016976338Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]} +{"id":"bd-2fp5r","title":"Layout Core Framework (Constraints + Compaction)","description":"Background\n- We need a deterministic layout engine reusable across diagram types.\n- Layout beauty is prioritized over strict spec fidelity.\n\nScope\n- Layout primitives: NodeBox, Port, ClusterBox, RouteGrid.\n- Implement constraint system (VPSC or longest-path compaction).\n- Sugiyama layering support hooks for flowcharts (layers, crossing minimization passes).\n- Cluster packing and nested subgraph layout with padding + margins.\n- Coarse-to-fine layout: initial coarse placement → compaction/refinement.\n- Objective scoring for tie-breaks: crossings, bends, variance, symmetry, alignment.\n\nConsiderations\n- Deterministic results under ties; no RNG.\n- Scale to large graphs with bounded heuristics and early exits.\n- Layout outputs world units, not terminal cells.\n\nTests / Validation\n- Unit tests for constraints and compaction.\n- Invariant checks: no overlaps, stable ordering under equal cost.\n\nSuccess Criteria\n- Produces non-overlapping layouts for supported diagrams.\n- Deterministic output for fixed input.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"Opus","created_at":"2026-02-04T18:38:57.851893409Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T05:52:40.111008588Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2fp5r","depends_on_id":"bd-1ri6i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T18:41:56.128093077Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2fp5r","depends_on_id":"bd-2oovu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T19:00:01.016976338Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]} {"id":"bd-2fva","title":"CLI help text screen numbers out of sync with ScreenId::ALL order","description":"The HELP_TEXT in cli.rs lists screens in a different order than the actual ScreenId::ALL array: - Help says CLI 11 = Macro Recorder, but code has CLI 11 = TerminalCapabilities - Help says CLI 22 = Virtualized Search, but code has CLI 22 = FormValidation, CLI 23 = VirtualizedSearch This causes confusion when writing E2E tests that reference screens by number. Fix: Regenerate the HELP_TEXT to match the actual ScreenId::ALL array order.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-03T18:13:58.927035352Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-03T18:16:06.246261068Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T18:16:06.246243435Z","close_reason":"Fixed CLI help text to match actual ScreenId::ALL order. Updated test assertion for Visual Effects screen number.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} {"id":"bd-2fx","title":"Implement export adapters (HTML/SVG/Text)","description":"PHASE 7 EXTRAS - EXPORT ADAPTERS ## Background Export adapters allow saving terminal UI output to various formats for sharing, documentation, and testing. ## Technical Requirements ### Export Formats #### HTML Export pub struct HtmlExporter { include_css: bool, class_prefix: String, font_family: String, } impl HtmlExporter { pub fn export(&self, buffer: &Buffer, pool: &GraphemePool) -> String { // Generate HTML with inline styles or CSS classes // Map colors to CSS colors // Handle wide characters with spans } } Output: 
Bold red
#### SVG Export pub struct SvgExporter { font_size: f32, cell_width: f32, cell_height: f32, background: Color, } impl SvgExporter { pub fn export(&self, buffer: &Buffer, pool: &GraphemePool) -> String { // Generate SVG with text elements // Position text precisely // Handle colors as fill attributes } } #### Plain Text Export pub struct TextExporter { strip_styles: bool, include_ansi: bool, } impl TextExporter { pub fn export(&self, buffer: &Buffer, pool: &GraphemePool) -> String { // strip_styles: just content // include_ansi: full ANSI sequences } } ### Frame Capture pub struct FrameCapture { buffer: Buffer, pool: GraphemePool, timestamp: Instant, } impl Frame { pub fn capture(&self) -> FrameCapture { // Clone current state for export } } ### Session Recording (Optional) pub struct SessionRecorder { frames: Vec, max_frames: usize, } impl SessionRecorder { pub fn record(&mut self, frame: &Frame); pub fn export_gif(&self) -> Vec; // Feature: gif pub fn export_asciinema(&self) -> String; // Feature: asciinema } ## Tests Required - [ ] HTML export preserves colors - [ ] HTML escape special chars - [ ] SVG dimensions correct - [ ] SVG text positioning - [ ] Plain text strips ANSI - [ ] Wide characters handled - [ ] Empty buffer exports cleanly ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] HTML exporter with CSS - [ ] SVG exporter with fonts - [ ] Plain text exporter - [ ] Frame capture API - [ ] Optional session recording - [ ] Feature gate: export ## Location: ftui-extras crate (feature = "export")","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-31T22:38:54.774907037Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T20:33:49.529145826Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T20:33:49.529123404Z","close_reason":"Implemented HTML, SVG, and Text export adapters with 32 passing tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2fx","depends_on_id":"bd-10i.3.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:17Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2fx","depends_on_id":"bd-10i.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:17Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]} {"id":"bd-2fyni","title":"Workspace sync to enable rebase/push","description":"Administrative: commit current working tree changes from concurrent agents to allow git pull --rebase and push. No functional edits beyond consolidating state.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:35:57.939415191Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T01:09:34.345022989Z","closed_at":"2026-02-05T01:09:34.345004173Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
